case_title: YU MENG VS. DEREK TOMINAGA et al

docket_entries.description: NOTICE TO PLAINTIFF
REMOVED FROM MASTER SHORT CAUSE CALENDAR ON SEP-14-2009. ASSIGNED TO PRETRIAL DEPT. 212 ON OCT-16-2009 AT 9:00 AM FOR CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE FOR FILING OF A JUDGMENT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT. (206)
ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT TOMINAGA, DEREK ,ALSO KNOWN AS DEREK M. TOMINAGA
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF APR-24-2009 CONTINUED TO MAY-29-2009 AT 9:00 AM IN DEPT. 212, FOR THE SUBMISSION OF CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENTS. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MENG, YU ESTIMATED TIME FOR TRIAL: 4.0 HOURS
NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL, SHORT CAUSE TRIAL SET FOR SEP-14-2009 AT 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 206. CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE ON MAY-29-2009 IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

LAW AND MOTION 301, PLAINTIFF YU MENG'S MOTION FOR JUDGMENT ON THE PLEADINGS IN FAVOR OF PLAINTIFF YU MENG AND AGAINST DEFENDANT DEREK TOMINAGA'S IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION HAS BEEN FILED. ORDER WAS SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR# 8189
ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF MENG, YU

MINI-MINUTES FOR JUL-23-2009 9:30 AM FOR DEPT 301
ORDER ON MOTION FOR JUDGMENT ON THE PLEADINGS IN FAVOR OF PLAINTIFF YU MENG AND AGAINST DEFENDANT DEREK TOMINAGA

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MENG, YU RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TOMINAGA, DEREK ,ALSO KNOWN AS DEREK M. TOMINAGA $50,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $3,080.60 INTEREST, $660.20 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $53,740.80, SEE SCANNED DOC
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT

NOTICE OF MOTION TO COMPEL ATTENDANCE OF DEFT DEREK TOMINAGA AT DEPOSITION, TO PRODUCE DOCUMENTS, AND FOR MONETARY SANCTIONS AGAINST DEFT DEREK TOMINAGA, PROOF OF SERVICE, POINTS AND AUTHORITIES, DECLARATION FILED BY PLAINTIFF MENG, YU HEARING SET FOR JUN-11-2009 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 612
AMENDED POS OF MTN FOR JUDGMENT ON THE PLEADINGS FILED BY PLAINTIFF MENG, YU
NOTICE OF CHANGE OF ADDRESS (TRANSACTION ID # 100082013) FILED BY ATTORNEY CHANG, JEFFREY JIA-HWA
MINI-MINUTES FOR JUN-11-2009 9:00 AM FOR DEPT 612

DISCOVERY, 612, PLAINTIFF YU MENG'S MOTION TO COMPEL ATTENDANCE OF DEFENDANT DEREK TOMINAGA AT DEPOSITION, TO PRODUCE DOCUMENTS, AND FOR MONETARY SANCTIONS IS ORDERED OFF CALENDAR. THE NOTICE WAS INSUFFICIENT PER C.C.P. SECTIONS 1005 AND 1013. THE FIRST DATE THIS MOTION COULD HAVE BEEN HEARD IS JUNE 15, 2009. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. MATTER NOT REPORTED.
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF ORDER/NOTICE OF RULING FILED RE: GRANTING PLAINTIFF YU MENG'S MOTION FOR JUDGMENT ON THE PLEADINGS FILED BY PLAINTIFF MENG, YU
MEMORANDUM OF COSTS AND DISBURSEMENTS, $660.20 TOTAL COSTS, MATURE DATE AUG-13-2009, FILED BY PLAINTIFF MENG, YU
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF OCT-16-2009 IS OFF CALENDAR JUDGMENT ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

Notice Of Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings In Favor Of Pl Yu Meng And Against Df Derek Tominaga And Request For Judicial Notice
Off Calendar Jul-23-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES- ATTY. TONY C. HOH, TEL. NO. 788-8811 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - PLAINTIFF YU MENG'S Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings In Favor Of Plaintiff Yu Meng And Against Defendant Derek Tominaga'S IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR # 8189 = (301/PJB)

Notice Of Motion To Compel Attendance Of Deft Derek Tominaga At Deposition, To Produce Documents, And For Monetary Sanctions Against Deft Derek Tominaga
Off Calendar Jun-11-2009 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Plaintiff Yu Meng's Motion To Compel Attendance Of Defendant Derek Tominaga At Deposition, To Produce Documents, And For Monetary Sanctions is ordered off calendar. The notice was insufficient per C.C.P. Sections 1005 and 1013. The first date this motion could have been heard is June 15, 2009. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. MATTER NOT REPORTED. (EAH/612)
